manifest.author: Charl Fourie
manifest.name: Journal Folder
manifest.description: Utilities for folder-based journaling

manifest.author: Jenny Tai
manifest.name: Journal Recap
manifest.description: Recap your journal entries with AI generated summaries.

manifest.author: Kageetai
manifest.name: Journal Review
manifest.description: Review your daily notes on their anniversaries, like "what happened today last year".

manifest.author: defcube
manifest.name: Journal to Daily Note
manifest.description: Add entries quickly to your daily note from any file.

manifest.author: Ordeeper
manifest.name: Journaling
manifest.description: View daily notes in a journal-like format, similar to Logseq. It enhances note organization and facilitates better reflection by consolidating daily notes into a continuous journaling view.

manifest.author: Sergii Kostyrko
manifest.name: Journals
manifest.description: Manage your journals in Obsidian

manifest.author: Justin Arnold
manifest.name: Journalyst
manifest.description: Journalyst enables easy creation of topic-specific journals. Organize your life into categories like sleep, routines, or work, with daily or recurring entries for effortless tracking and reflection.

manifest.author: Moritz Jung
manifest.name: JS Engine
manifest.description: Run JavaScript from within your notes.

manifest.author: Niaz Morshed
manifest.name: JSON Collapsible
manifest.description: Display JSON data as collapsible trees in your notes.

manifest.author: Dario Baumberger
manifest.name: JSON table
manifest.description: Simply switch between JSON and tables. Generate a table from a JSON string or a URL (which returns JSON) in your notes. Generate JSON from a table in your notes.

manifest.author: Emile
manifest.name: Juggl
manifest.description: Adds a completely interactive, stylable and expandable graph view to Obsidian.

manifest.author: Iván Mansilla
manifest.name: JuliaPlots
manifest.description: Plot a function graph inside of your notes using Julia.

manifest.author: Maro Park
manifest.name: Jump to Terminal
manifest.description: Open a system terminal at the directory of the current note.

manifest.author: Deniz Terzioglu
manifest.name: JupyMD
manifest.description: Use Jupyter notebooks in Obsidian.

manifest.author: cteplovs
manifest.name: Jupyter Notebook Viewer
manifest.description: Renders .ipynb Jupyter notebook files with syntax-highlighted code cells, formatted markdown, and inline outputs.

manifest.author: Lukas Collier & Emi Le
manifest.name: Jura Links
manifest.description: Verlinke deine notierten Gesetzesnormen, Aktenzeichen und Zeitschriften-Fundstellen mit Gesetzesanbietern.

manifest.author: Aidi Stan
manifest.name: Just Calendar
manifest.description: Just a calendar which works with the core plugins.

manifest.author: Ellpeck
manifest.name: Just Share Please
manifest.description: Quickly and easily share individual notes online using an anonymized link. Also easy to self-host!

manifest.author: Roman Soriano
manifest.name: Just Vertical Tabs
manifest.description: Moves the tab bar from the top to a vertical orientation on the left or right side of the editor pane.

manifest.author: Martin Sakowski
manifest.name: JW Library Linker
manifest.description: Converts JW Library references to actual links in JW Library.

manifest.author: marcos
manifest.name: JW Meeting Timer
manifest.description: Fetches the weekly Life and Ministry meeting programme from wol.jw.org and provides per-assignment countdown timers with visual states in a sidebar.

manifest.author: Jason Peters
manifest.name: KAI Command Center
manifest.description: A locally-run dashboard plugin for the KAI Vault OS.

manifest.author: Oli
manifest.name: Kale Graph
manifest.description: Render mathematical graphs.

manifest.author: Starsha
manifest.name: Kanban Archiver
manifest.description: Archive completed Kanban cards older than a configurable number of days to a separate archive file. Auto-stamps completion dates so cards are always archivable.

manifest.author: I. Welch Canavan
manifest.name: Kanban Bases View
manifest.description: A kanban-style drag-and-drop custom view for Bases.

manifest.author: Ankit Kapur
manifest.name: Kanban Status Updater
manifest.description: Automatically updates a 'status' property in a note when its card is moved on a Kanban board

manifest.author: Jorge Giovannelli
manifest.name: Kanban Sync
manifest.description: Syncs Kanban board state with note frontmatter.

manifest.author: Chihiro Watanabe
manifest.name: Kanban view
manifest.description: Kanban view for bases.

manifest.author: Dan Seaman
manifest.name: Kandyban
manifest.description: Non-destructive Kanban view over markdown-based project backlog and milestones. Reads bold-key metadata directly, lets you drag cards between status columns, edit enums inline, and writes changes back without touching the rest of the file.

manifest.author: neex
manifest.name: Kaper
manifest.description: Edit and preview Kaper recipes inline as structured blocks.

manifest.author: TeoEchavarria
manifest.name: Karma Notes
manifest.description: Reddit-style upvote/downvote for your notes. 1 vote per day, auto-decay after 2 weeks of inactivity.

manifest.author: Lhy723
manifest.name: KarMind
manifest.description: Manage notes with LLM-powered wiki compilation, Q&A, backfill, and health checks.

manifest.author: Greener-Dalii
manifest.name: Karpathy LLM Wiki
manifest.description: Karpathy's LLM Wiki implementation - multi-page knowledge generation with entity/concept pages and conversational query.

manifest.author: hkcanan
manifest.name: KatmerCode
manifest.description: Multi-provider AI chat (Claude, Gemini, Codex, Antigravity) with per-tab providers, inline diff editing, academic research skills, and MCP support.

manifest.author: David Bowman
manifest.name: Kavita Sync
manifest.description: Sync annotations and highlights from your Kavita server to your vault.

manifest.author: Ezben
manifest.name: Keep the Rhythm
manifest.description: Visualize and track your writing habit!

manifest.description: View or draw chemical structures and reactions using Ketcher.
